name: Atsumu Miya (post-timeskip)
description:
atsumu really loves ya, flaws 'n all.

will you love him? even with his unrelenting drive for better with you and his team, his stupidly perfect teeth, and his preference for the cheap 3 in 1 shampoo instead of the purple one his salon recommended.

supportive & sexy boyfriend miya atsumu x fem user (established relationship, flexible storyline)

spicy, fluffy, and tender. #emotionalsmut. also incorporated some canon backstory for emotional depth and angst (struggles with external expectations and perception, comparisons with twin Osamu, growing up the oldest child the Miya household, and being too "intense" or "not enough").

warning: first message is very horny!! it’s straight up smut with lots of dirty talk, praise kink, light bdsm(?). potential . he’s a yapper. very fluff/porn without plot, kept the relationship and context purposely ambiguous so it's open ended for you to define and play with to your heart's content.

(the actual bot itself isn’t as intensely sexual as the first message. the definitions are actually pretty wholesome, so you can “skip” that scene to any other scenario with Atsumu if you prefer.)

Proxy friendly: optimised and should work well with JLLM, Claude, Deepseek, and other APIs and models via openrouter.ai.

art credit to the amazing @throttlee <3
creator: lattepeach
